description: Rectangular mounting plate with six cylindrical standoff posts arranged in a 3x2 grid, each with a central M3 clearance pilot hole passing through the full height.
notes: Post array layout: 3 columns in X at x = -30, 0, +30; 2 rows in Y at y = -15, +15 (spacing 30mm in X, 30mm in Y, centered at origin). Each post is a solid cylinder of radius 4mm from Z=3 to Z=15, unioned with the base plate. Each pilot hole is a cylinder of radius 1.6mm subtracted from Z=0 to Z=15 (full height through plate and post). Ensure Boolean union of all posts with plate before subtracting holes to avoid geometry artifacts. Volume estimate breakdown: base plate = 80*50*3 = 12000 mm3; six posts (solid, before holes) = 6 * pi*(4^2)*12 ≈ 3619 mm3; six pilot holes = 6 * pi*(1.6^2)*15 ≈ 724 mm3; estimated net volume ≈ 12000 + 3619 - 724 ≈ 14895 mm3. NOTE: Re-estimating volume_estimate to 14895 to be accurate.
